attributes.content:
## Overview

The Receipt card gives the workspace a structured home for proof of payment with line items, payment method, date, and total. Read-only record (replaces "Transaction").

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Receipt acts as a canonical operational record. It keeps important facts, state changes, timestamps, and linked parties in one place so downstream workflows, approvals, and reporting can all rely on the same source of truth.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Product]]** -- Product can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Receipt.
- **[[Order]]** -- Order can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Receipt.
- **[[Invoice]]** -- Invoice can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Receipt.
- **[[Deal]]** -- Deal can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Receipt.
- **[[Contact]]** -- Receipt often needs a person-level reference for ownership, communication, or accountability.
- **[[Organization]]** -- Receipt frequently sits inside an account, company, or team-level relationship context.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Receipt as the structured home for proof of payment with line items, payment method, date, and total. Read-only record (replaces "Transaction") and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Receipt when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Receipt stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.
